meaning: n.(将病人的血存储起来在手术时输回其体内的)自体输血法
examples: Conclusion: Intraoperative autotransfusion could not influence the incidence of postoperative hematoma of intracranial meningiomas.
Prestore autotransfusion can avoid heterotransfusion, which stimulates hematopoietic system and is conducive to recovery of the patients.
Objective: to investigate the application of the device and technique of extracorporeal circulation to autotransfusion in large vessel surgery.
